name: Princess Poopoalis Portuguese Soup
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Package Portuguese Sausage, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer ham shanks in water for 1-1/2 to 2 hours or until meat falls off bones.
2. Remove bones. Add sausage. Simmer for 20-30 minutes.
3. Add carrots, onions, tomatoes, and tomato sauce; cook until carrots are at parboil stage.
4. Add potatoes, beans, cabbage, and seasonings. Simmer until vegetables are done.
